Container.Name: broccoli_omniroute
Container.Overview: OmniRoute — free AI gateway that connects coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Copilot) to 236 providers including 50+ with a free tier, through one OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Provides RTK + Caveman token compression (15–95% savings), 17 routing strategies with auto-fallback, MCP server (87 tools), A2A protocol, and an interactive dashboard. Dashboard and API both run on port 20128 (API at /v1). Data is persisted in /app/data — map it to a host path so settings, provider credentials, and combos survive container restarts. Set OMNIROUTE_WS_BRIDGE_SECRET to a strong random string for production use.

Config.Name: Dashboard / API Port
Config.Description: Container Port: 20128 — OmniRoute dashboard and OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (/v1). Point coding agents to http://<unraid-ip>:20128/v1

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent data directory for provider credentials, combos, settings, and cached state. Map this to a host path so data survives container restarts and upgrades.

Config.Name: WebSocket Bridge Secret
Config.Description: Required for production. Set to a strong random string (for example: openssl rand -hex 32). Secures the internal WebSocket bridge.

Config.Name: Public Base URL
Config.Description: Optional. Set when OmniRoute is served behind a reverse proxy or domain (for example: https://omniroute.example.com). Used for OAuth callbacks and dashboard links.

Config.Name: Node Memory (MB)
Config.Description: Node.js heap ceiling in MB for the Docker runtime. Increase if you see out-of-memory errors under heavy load (for example: 1024).
